## Analyzers (3)

### [Autofocus_SearchJSON v1.0](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/analyzers/Autofocus/Autofocus_SearchJSON.json)
Search samples in Autofocus with a full search query in JSON

- **Author:** ANSSI
- **License:** AGPL-V3
- **Data Types:** `other`

### [Autofocus_SearchIOC v1.0](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/analyzers/Autofocus/Autofocus_SearchIOC.json)
Search samples in Autofocus based on a single IOC

- **Author:** ANSSI
- **License:** AGPL-V3
- **Data Types:** `domain`, `fqdn`, `user-agent`, `imphash`, `ip`, `mutex`, `tag`, `url`

### [Autofocus_GetSampleAnalysis v1.0](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/analyzers/Autofocus/Autofocus_GetSampleAnalysis.json)
Get full analysis from a sample based on its hash

- **Author:** ANSSI
- **License:** AGPL-V3
- **Data Types:** `hash`
